query: Can you list some publications that discuss the evaluation metrics used in semantic role labeling tasks, specifically focusing on precision and evaluation scripts used in shared tasks like SemEval?
criteria: semantic role labeling evaluation metrics precision
SemEval shared task semantic role labeling evaluation script
precision recall semantic role labeling shared task

title.value: Introduction to the CoNLL-2005 Shared Task: Semantic Role Labeling

recommendation_reason.value: present a general overview of the 19 systems that have contributed to the task, providing a comparative description and results.

supported_research_question.value: describe the data sets and evaluation methods

method.value: describe the data sets and evaluation methods

data_or_scenario.value: CoNLL-2005 shared task on Semantic Role Labeling

main_conclusion.value: providing a comparative description and results.

limitations.value: We introduce the specification and goals of the task, describe the data sets and evaluation methods, and present a general overview of the 19 systems that have contributed to the task, providing a comparative description and results.

relevance_strength.value: In this paper we describe the CoNLL-2005 shared task on Semantic Role Labeling.

title.value: PriMeSRL-Eval: A Practical Quality Metric for Semantic Role Labeling Systems Evaluation

recommendation_reason.value: we address key practical issues with existing evaluation scripts and propose a more strict SRL evaluation metric, PriMeSRL.

supported_research_question.value: Unfortunately, the existing SRL evaluation scripts do not consider the full effect of this error propagation aspect.

method.value: propose a more strict SRL evaluation metric, PriMeSRL.

data_or_scenario.value: They either evaluate arguments independent of predicate sense (CoNLL09) or do not evaluate predicate sense at all (CoNLL05)

main_conclusion.value: the quality evaluation of all SoTA SRL models drops significantly, and their relative rankings also change

limitations.value: Unfortunately, the existing SRL evaluation scripts do not consider the full effect of this error propagation aspect.

relevance_strength.value: a more strict SRL evaluation metric

title.value: Evaluating Machine Translation Utility via Semantic Role Labels

recommendation_reason.value: We present the methodology that underlies new metrics for semantic machine translation evaluation that we are developing.

supported_research_question.value: We present the methodology that underlies new metrics for semantic machine translation evaluation that we are developing.

method.value: We present the methodology that underlies new metrics for semantic machine translation evaluation that we are developing.

data_or_scenario.value: Direct data analysis is still needed to understand how semantic models can be leveraged to evaluate the utility of MT output.

main_conclusion.value: Recent work has started introducing semantic models into SMT so as to improve the semantic adequacy.

limitations.value: Such roles can be annotated using Propbank-style PRED and ARG labels.

relevance_strength.value: We present the methodology that underlies new metrics for semantic machine translation evaluation that we are developing.
